# Global Autonomous Runtime Protocol Ecosystem

Integrated control-plane over planet-scale runtime infrastructure, AI optimization, and autonomous governance.

## Commands
- `python src/main.py "autonomous runtime ecosystem status"`
- `python src/main.py "autonomous runtime ecosystem node register role=<edge|compute|coordination|archive> name=<n> [os=<os>] [power=<p>]"`
- `python src/main.py "autonomous runtime ecosystem optimize"`
- `python src/main.py "autonomous runtime ecosystem governance propose component=<name> strategy=<name>"`
- `python src/main.py "autonomous runtime ecosystem governance simulate"`
- `python src/main.py "autonomous runtime ecosystem governance rollout percent=<1..100>"`
- `python src/main.py "autonomous runtime ecosystem governance validate"`
- `python src/main.py "autonomous runtime ecosystem grade"`
- `python src/main.py "autonomous runtime ecosystem maximize"`

## Architecture Mapping
- Planet-scale runtime infrastructure: role-based nodes + mesh integration
- AI optimization layer: SERP telemetry analysis recommendations
- Autonomous governance: proposal/simulation/staged rollout/validation
- State portability: provided by SERP/RCRP state export/import paths
